steps.title: Expand the square (and other terms)
steps.content: Each term has a common factor of $8x$: $8x^{10}=8x\cdot x^{9}$, $-8x^{9}=8x\cdot(-x^{8})$, and $88x=8x\cdot 11$.

steps.title: Combine and simplify
steps.content: Factoring gives $$8x^{10}-8x^{9}+88x=8x(x^{9}-x^{8}+11).$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
